headline: Reassessing Brown‑Forman (BF.B) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance context Brown-Forman (BF.B) has been under pressure, with the share price showing a 0.9% decline over the past day, a 4.5% decline over the past month, and a 5.8% decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Brown-Forman. At a share price of US$25.55, Brown-Forman’s short term share price momentum has been weak. That aligns with a 1 year total shareholder return of 23.47% and deeper 3 and 5 year declines. If this shift in sentiment has you reassessing...
